tuv.seg: Kanw farali ka baara k…õ ni minnu ye
A' ye ladamukan kura fara "{ $inputValue }" kan.

All voice clips in the dataset are scrubbed of personally identifying information. When a contributor provides demographic data via their profile, that information is de-identified from their voice clips before being bundled for download in the dataset and is never made public on their profile page.

Kumakan-klip minnu b…õ kunnafonidilan k…în…î, olu b…õ…õ b…õ s…îg…î ni kunnafoniw ye minnu b…õ m…îg…î y…õr…õ d…în. Ni d…õm…õbaga d…î ye jamanaden hak…õ kunnafoniw di a ka kunnafonis…õb…õn f…õ, o kunnafoniw b…õ b…î u ka kumakanw na sanni u ka fara …≤…îg…în kan walasa ka telesarse kunnafonidilan k…în…î, wa u t…õ f…î foroba la abada u ka kunnafonis…õb…õn …≤…õ kan.

Anonymized user data like age, gender, and accent helps improve the audio data used to train the accuracy of speech recognition engines. Your username and email will never be associated with your submitted data, and you can choose whether to make your username public or anonymous.

Baarak…õlaw ka kunnafoniw minnu t…îg…î ma f…î i n‚Äôa f…î u si hak…õ, c…õya ni musoya ani u f…îcogo, olu b…õ d…õm…õ ka kunnafoni lam…õntaw …≤…õ, minnu b…õ k…õ ka kuma d…înni masinw ka ti…≤…õni dege. I ka baarak…õla t…îg…î ni i ka imeyili t…õna j…õ abada i ka kunnafoniw cilenw na, wa i b…õ se k‚Äôa sugandi n‚Äôi b…õna i ka baarak…õla t…îg…î k…õ foroba la walima n‚Äôi t…îg…î t…õ f…î.
By opting in to receive emails you state that you are okay with Mozilla handling this info as explained in Mozilla‚Äôs <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
Ni i y‚Äôa sugandi ka batakiw s…îr…î i b‚Äôa jira k'I s…îna ko Mozilla ka nin kunnafoni in lasago i n‚Äôa f…î a …≤…õf…îlen b…õ cogo min na Mozilla ka <privacyLink> Gundo sariya </privacyLink> k…în…î.
By providing some information about yourself, the audio data you submit to Common Voice will be more useful to Speech Recognition engines that use this data to improve their accuracy.

Ni i ye kunnafoni d…îw di i y…õr…õ kan, i b…õ kunnafoni lam…õntaw minnu ci Common Voice ma, olu nafa b…õna bonya kos…õb…õ Kuma ma D…înniya-min…õn minnu b…õ baara K…õ ni o kunnafoniw ye walasa k‚Äôu ka ti…≤…õni …≤…õ.
Check if your language is listed on the Common Voice Languages page. If not, fill out this form and we‚Äôll send you a handy email explaining how to get your language set up.
A laj…õ n‚Äôi ka kan s…õb…õnnen b…õ kan j…õlenw …≤…õ. N‚Äôo t…õ, i ka nin s…õb…õn in dafa, an b…õna i ka bataki ci i ma min b…õ se ka k…õ i bolo ka …≤…õf…îli k…õ i ka kan sigicogo kan.

Common Voice is a crowdsourcing platform, and the languages were all added by volunteers. We would love for you to add your language! <languageRequestLink>Ask about adding your language.</languageRequestLink>

Common Voice ye jama s…îr…îy…îr…î ye, wa kanw b…õ…õ farala …≤…îg…în kan ni bolomafaraw ye. An b‚Äôa f…õ kos…õb…õ k‚Äôaw ka kan fara a kan! <languageRequestLink>Aw ye …≤ininkali k…õ aw ka kan farali kan.
Common Voice is Mozilla's initiative to help teach machines how real people speak.
Common Voice ye Mozilla ka f…õ…õr…õ ye walasa ka d…õm…õ don ka masinw kalan m…îg…î lakikaw b…õ kuma cogo min na.
Common Voice is part of Mozilla's initiative to help teach machines how real people speak.
Common Voice ye Mozilla ka baara d…î ye walasa ka d…õm…õ don ka masinw kalan m…îg…î lakikaw b…õ kuma cogo min na.
Content available under a <licenseLink>Creative Commons license</licenseLink>
K…în…îkow b…õ s…îr…î <licenseLink>Creative Commons license< k…în…î
Aw ka d…õm…õ don aw ka kumakan na
F…îlisen min b…õ sen na, O tali
Aw ye aw ka kan di
Don't see your language on Common Voice yet?
Aw ma aw ka kan ye Common Voice kan f…îl…î wa?
Don‚Äôt see your language reflected in the Dataset? To request a language head over to our Languages page.
I …≤…õ t…õ i ka kan na Dataset k…în…î wa? Walasa ka kan d…î …≤ini, taa an ka Kanw …≤…õ kan.
During contribution submission feedback will be skipped after clicking 'Submit'. Contribution will continue directly with the next set of 5 recordings or validations.
Bolomafaraw ci waati la, jaabiw b…õna t…õm…õ ‚ÄòSubmit‚Äô digilen k…îf…õ. Bolomafara b…õna t‚Äôa f…õ k‚Äôa …≤…õsin a ma ni f…îlisen 5 walima ti…≤…õniw kulu nata ye.

Each entry in the dataset consists of a unique MP3 and corresponding text file. Many of the { $total } recorded hours in the dataset also include demographic metadata like age, sex, and accent that can help train the accuracy of speech recognition engines. The dataset currently consists of { $valid } validated hours in { $languages } languages, but we‚Äôre always adding more voices and languages. Take a look at our Languages page to request a language or start contributing.

Donan kelen-kelen b…õ…õ b…õ K…õ ni MP3 k…õr…õnk…õr…õnnen ye ani s…õb…õnni-dosiy…õri min b…õ B…õn o ma. { $total } l…õr…õ minnu s…õb…õnna kunnafonidilan k…în…î, olu caman fana b…õ jamanadenw ka kunnafonidilanw k…în…î i n‚Äôa f…î si hak…õ, c…õya ni musoya, ani f…îcogo minnu b…õ se ka d…õm…õ don ka kuma d…înni masinw ka ti…≤…õni dege. Donanw kulu b…õ k…õ sisan { $valid } l…õr…õw ye minnu s…õg…õs…õg…õra { $kanw } kanw na, nka an b…õ kan ni kan caman fara a kan tuma b…õ…õ. Aw ye an ka Kanw …≤…õ laj…õ walasa ka kan d…î …≤ini walima ka d…õm…õ damin…õ.
Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required.
Y…îr…î minnu taamasiy…õn ye dolow (*) ye, olu wajibiyalen don.

For these launched languages the website has been successfully <localizationGlossaryLink>localized</localizationGlossaryLink>, and has enough <sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink>sentences collected</sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink> to allow for ongoing <speakLink>Speak</speakLink> and <listenLink>Listen</listenLink> contributions.

Nin kan damin…õna ninnu na, siti in ye <localizationGlossaryLink>localization</localizationGlossaryLink> s…îr…î ka …≤…õ, wa <sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink>kumasen caman b…õ a la minnu laj…õlen don</sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink> walasa ka sira di <speakLink>Speak</speakLink> ani <listenLink>Lam…õnni</listenLink ma minnu b…õ taa …≤…õ > bolomafaraw.
Yala i ye an ka Sariyaw kalan wa?
Help teach machines how real people speak, donate your voice at { $link }
D…õm…õ ka masinw kalan m…îg…î lakikaw b…õ kuma cogo min na, i ka kan di { $link } ma.
Help us build a high quality, publicly open dataset
An d…õm…õ ka datas…õti …≤umanba d…î dank…õn…õmaya, min dab…îra foroba mago kama
Help us find others to donate their voice!
An d…õm…õ ka m…îg…î w…õr…õw s…îr…î walasa k‚Äôu kan di!
kelen L…õr…õ kelen validelen don f…îl…î! d…î w…õr…õ { $hours } l…õr…õ dafalenw fo ka na se bi ma!
How does Common Voice calculate hours?
Common Voice b…õ l…õr…õw jate cogo di?
Common Voice b…õ baara k…õ cogo di?
How do you ensure anonymity and privacy of the people who donated their voices?
M…îg…î minnu y‚Äôu kan di, i b…õ olu t…îg…î f…î cogo di ani k‚Äôu ka gundo d…în?
How would you describe your accent?
I b…õna i ka kuma f…îcogo …≤…õf…î cogo di?
I am a non-native speaker and I speak with an accent, do you still want my voice?
Ne ye m…îg…î ye min t…õ kan f…îbaga ye ani ne b…õ kuma ni accent ye, yala i b‚Äôa f…õ hali bi ne kan na wa?
I'd like to receive emails such as goal reminders, my progress updates and newsletters about Common Voice.
N b…õ f…õ ka im…õyi s…îr…î walasa ka N Hakilijigin N ka la…≤iniw na, N ka baraw taabolo la ani Common Voice Kunnaf…îni kuraw la
Yala ne ka jateb…îs…õb…õn kunnafoniw b…õ foroba la wa?
Join the Common Voice mailing list
Don Common Voice im…õyi listi k…în…î
Keep track of your progress and metrics across multiple languages.
Aw ye aw ka …≤…õtaa ni jatemin…õw jatemin…õ kan caman k…în…î.
Keep track of your progress with a profile and help our voice data be more accurate.
Aw ye aw ka …≤…õtaa jatemin…õ ni kunnafonis…õb…õn ye ani ka an ka kumakan kunnafoniw d…õm…õ u ka k…õ ti…≤…õ ye.

Languages can have their <validationRulesLink>own validation rules</validationRulesLink> with additional requirements. If there is no specific validation file for a language, we are using the generic English rules.

Kanw b…õ se k‚Äôu ka <validationRulesLink>u y…õr…õ ka dantig…õli sariyaw</validationRulesLink> ni wajibi w…õr…õw ye. Ni kan d…î ka dantig…õli-dosiy…õri k…õr…õnk…õr…õnnen t…õ yen, an b…õ baara k…õ ni tubabukan sariyaw b…õ…õ laj…õlen ye.
Looks like there aren't any clips to listen to in this language. Help us fill the queue by recording some now.
A b…õ iko klip si t…õ yen ka Lam…õ nin kan in na. An d…õm…õ ka kumakan d…îw ta sisan.
Make your submitted data as rich as possible by providing some anonymous demographic data. We de-identify all demographic data before making it public.

Aw ye aw ka kunnafoniw cilenw k…õ f…õn nafamaw ye cogo b…õ…õ la, aw k…õt…î ka jamanadenw ka kunnafoniw d…îw di minnu t…îg…î ma f…î. An b…õ jamanaden hak…õ kunnafoniw b…õ…õ dogo ka s…îr…î k‚Äôu b…î k…õn…õ kan.

Most of the data used by large companies isn‚Äôt available to the majority of people. We think that stifles innovation. So we‚Äôve launched Common Voice, a project to help make voice recognition open and accessible to everyone.

Baarak…õdabaw b…õ baara k…õ ni kunnafonidilan minnu ye, olu fanba t…õ s…îr…î m…îg…î fanba bolo. An hakili la o¬∂ b…õ kokuradonni dabila. O la, an ye Common Voice damin…õ, poroz…õ min b…õ d…õm…õ don ka kumakan d…înni da wuli¬∂ ani ka se b…õ…õ ma.

Most of the data used by large companies isn‚Äôt available to the majority of people. We think that stifles innovation. So we‚Äôve launched Project Common Voice, a project to help make voice recognition open to everyone.

Baarak…õdabaw b…õ baara k…õ ni kunnafonidilan minnu ye, olu fanba t…õ s…îr…î m…îg…î fanba bolo. An b'a miiri¬∂ min b…õ kokuradonni dabila. O la an ye Project Common Voice damin…õ, poroz…õ min b…õ d…õm…õ don ka kumakan dilan¬∂ d…õm…õbagaw walasa ka jogo…≤umanya yiriwa. A ka n…îg…în ten d…õ! d…înniya dab…îra b…õ…õ ye.

Most speech databases are trained with an overrepresentation of certain demographics which results in a bias towards <articleLink>male and middle class</articleLink>. Accents and dialects that tend to be under-represented in training data sets are typically associated with groups of people who are already marginalised. Many machines also struggle to understand female voices. This is why in our voice database we want variety!
Kuma kunnafonidilan fanba b…õ dege ni jamanaden hak…õ d…îw jirali ye kojugu min b…õ na ni …≤…õmaj…îbaliya ye <articleLink>c…õ ni c…õmanc…õla< la
Mozilla Common Voice is an initiative to help teach machines how real people speak.
Mozilla Common Voice ye f…õ…õr…õ ye min b…õ d…õm…õ don ka masinw kalan m…îg…î lakikaw b…õ kuma cogo min na.

Mozilla is dedicated to keeping the web open and accessible for everyone. To do that we need to empower web creators through projects like Common Voice. As voice technologies proliferate beyond niche applications, we believe they must serve all users equally. That means investing in more languages and accommodating diverse accents and demographics when building and testing voice technologies. Common Voice is a public resource available to everyone and Mozilla teams and developers around the world are already using it on our own projects as well.

Mozilla y‚Äôa y…õr…õ di walasa ka …õnt…õrin…õti da wuli ani ka se ka s…îr…î b…õ…õ bolo. Walasa k‚Äôo k…õ an ka kan ka fanga di …õnt…õrin…õti dab…îbagaw ma poroz…õw f…õ i n‚Äôa f…î Common Voice. Ni kanko f…õ…õr…õw b…õ ka caya ka t…õm…õn nis…õ baarak…õmin…õnw kan, an dalen b‚Äôa la k‚Äôu ka kan ka baara k…õ baarak…õlaw b…õ…õ ye cogo kelen na. O k…îr…î ye ka wari bila kan caman na ani ka f…îcogo ni jamanadenw hak…õ suguya caman ladon ni kanko f…õ…õr…õw j…îli n‚Äôu k…îr…îb…î. Common Voice ye foroba nafolo ye min b…õ s…îr…î b…õ…õ bolo wa Mozilla j…õkuluw ni baarak…õlaw b…õ baara k…õ n‚Äôa ye kaban an y…õr…õ ka poroz…õw kan fana.
Note: You will still need to select between Speak or Listen to change contribution type.
K…îl…îsili: I b…õna a …≤ini hali bi ka kuma f…î walima ka Lam…õ walasa ka bolomafara suguya falen.

Now you can donate your voice to help us build an open-source voice database that anyone can use to make innovative apps for devices and the web. Read a sentence to help machines learn how real people speak. Check the work of other contributors to improve the quality. It‚Äôs that simple!

Sisan aw b…õ se k‚Äôaw ka kan di walasa k‚Äôan d…õm…õ ka kan kunnafonidilan dafalen d…î j…î, m…îg…î b…õ…õ b…õ se ka baara k…õ ni min ye¬∂ ka porogaramu kura dilan min…õnw ni …õnt…õrin…õti kan. Kumasen d…î kalan walasa ka masinw d…õm…õ u k‚Äôa d…în m…îg…î s…õb…õw b…õ kuma cogo min na. Aw ye m…îg…î w…õr…õw ka baara laj…õ¬∂
Once logged in you can select your languages from the profile section.
Ni i donna a k…în…î i b…õ se k‚Äôi ka kanw sugandi ka b…î i ka profil y…îr…î la.
Optionally join on our email list for updates and new information about the project.
Ni aw b‚Äôa f…õ ka fara an ka bataki cilenw kan walasa ka kunnafoni kuraw ni kunnafoni kuraw s…îr…î poroz…õ in kan.

Optionally submitted demographic data (e.g. age, gender, language, and accent) will never be made public on your profile, and will not be linked to your account in the dataset. Individual audio clips will be associated with demographic data for the purpose of more accurate analysis - for example, a researcher might want to target a training model to a specific demographic segment.

Jamanadenw ka kunnafoniw minnu b…õ ci i y…õr…õ sago la (misali la, u si hak…õ, c…õya ni musoya, kan, ani u f…îcogo), olu t…õna k…õ foroba ye abada i ka kunnafonis…õb…õn kan, wa u t…õna siri i ka jateb…îs…õb…õn na kunnafonidilan k…în…î. Odio-klip kelen-kelen b…õ…õ b…õna j…õ jamanadenw ka kunnafoniw na walasa ka s…õg…õs…õg…õli k…õ ka …≤…õ - misali la, …≤ininik…õla d…î b…õ se k‚Äôa f…õ ka kalan misali d…î …≤…õsin jamanaden hak…õ y…îr…î k…õr…õnk…õr…õnnen d…î ma.

Our source text is made up of original contributor donations as well as dialogue from public domain movie scripts like <italic>It‚Äôs a Wonderful Life</italic>.
You can view our source sentences in this <githubLink>GitHub folder</githubLink>.

An ka s…îr…îy…îr…î s…õb…õn b…õ k…õ ni d…õm…õbagaw ka bolomafara f…îl…îw ye ka fara baro kan ka b…î foroba filimu s…õb…õnniw na i n‚Äôa f…î <italic>It‚Äôs a Wonderful Life</italic>.
Aw b…õ se k‚Äôan ka kumasenw b…îy…îr…î laj…õ nin <githubLink>GitHub foli</githubLink> k…în…î.
Overall project status: see how far we‚Äôve come!
Poroz…õ cogoya b…õ…õ laj…õlen : a laj…õ an sera y…îr…î min na!

Common Voice is a publicly available voice dataset, powered by the voices of volunteer contributors around the world. People who want to build voice applications can use the dataset to train machine learning models.

At present, most voice datasets are owned by companies, which stifles innovation. Voice datasets also underrepresent: non-English speakers, people of colour, disabled people, women and LGBTQIA+ people. This means that voice-enabled technology doesn‚Äôt work at all for many languages, and where it does work, it may not perform equally well for everyone. We want to change that by mobilising people everywhere to share their voice.

Common Voice ye kan kunnafonidilan ye min b…õ s…îr…î foroba la, min b…õ baara k…õ ni bolomafara dibagaw kanw ye di…≤…õ fan b…õ…õ. M…îg…î minnu b‚Äôa f…õ ka kumakan baarak…õmin…õnw dilan, olu b…õ se ka baara k…õ ni kunnafonidilan ye walasa ka masin kalanni misaliw dege.

Sisan , kumakan kunnafonidilan fanba ye t…înw ta ye , o b…õ kokuradonni bali . Kan kunnafonidilanw fana t…õ : tubabukan f…îbagaw t…õ, m…îg…î kul…õrilenw, sebaliw, musow ani LGBTQIA+ m…îg…îw. O k…îr…î ye ko f…õ…õr…õ min b…õ K…õ ni kan ye, o t…õ baara K…õ hali d…î…înin kan caman na, wa a b…õ baara K…õ y…îr…î min na, a b…õ Se ka K…õ ko a t…õ baara K…õ cogo kelen na b…õ…õ f…õ. An b' a f…õ k' o f…õn caman Changer ni ka m…îg…îw laj…õ y…îr…î b…õ…õ walasa k' u kan tila …≤…îg…în na .
Press play, listen & tell us: did they accurately speak the sentence below?
A digi , ka bilaaala , ka lam…õn & k'a f…î an ye : yala u ye kumasen in f…î ka …≤…õ wa?
Press { shortcut-play-toggle } to toggle play mode
{ shortcut-play-toggle } digi walasa ka tulonk…õcogo caman wuli
Profile information improves the audio data used in training speech recognition accuracy.
Profil kunnafoniw b…õ kunnafoniw lam…õntaw …≤…õ ka taa a f…õ minnu b…õ k…õ ka kuma d…înni ti…≤…õni dege.
I lab…õnlen don ka do faara a kan wa ?
Yala i lab…õnnen don k‚Äôi kan di wa?
Receive emails such as challenge and goal reminders, progress updates, and newsletters about Common Voice.
N b…õ f…õ ka im…õyi s…îr…î walasa ka N Hakilijigin N ka la…≤iniw na, N ka baraw taabolo la ani Common Voice Kunnaf…îni kuraw la
Recording voice clips is an integral part of building our open dataset; some would say it's the fun part too.
Kumakan-klipw s…õb…õnni ye an ka kunnafonidilan dafalen j…îli y…îr…î koloma ye; d…îw b…õna a f…î ko …≤…õnaj…õy…îr…î fana don.
Segin ka ta Common Voice Kan
Ka segin ka taa kanw ma
See how your progress compares to other contributors all over the world.
A laj…õ i ka …≤…õtaa b…õ se ka suma cogo min na ni d…õm…õbaga t…îw ye di…≤…õ fan b…õ…õ la.
Sentences are collected for people to read aloud.
Kumasenw b…õ laj…õ walasa m…îg…îw ka se k‚Äôu kalan ni kanba ye.
I t…îg…î s…õb…õn ka k…înti d…î s…îr…î
Sign up for Common Voice newsletters, goal reminders and progress updates
I t…îg…î s…õb…õn Common Voice kunnafonidis…õb…õnw na, kuntilenna hakilijiginw ani …≤…õtaa kunnafoniw
i t…îg…î s…õb…õn walasa ka kunnafoni kuraw s…îr…î im…õyi la
I t…îg…î s…õb…õn walasa ka { $lang } kunnafoni kuraw s…îr…î:

Some languages have enormous variation in grammar, vocabulary and pronunciation. For this reason, we are <ctaLink>introducing ‚ÄòVariants‚Äô</ctaLink> in 2022. This gives communities a way to distinguish their languages within the larger dataset.

Kan d…îw ka da…≤…õgafe, da…≤…õw ani f…îcogo b…õ …≤…îg…în B…î kos…õb…õ. O de kama, an b…õ <ctaLink>ka ‚ÄòVariants‚Äô</ctaLink> bila senkan san 2022. O b…õ f…õ…õr…õ di sigidam…îg…îw ma u ka kanw danfara la kunnafonidilanba k…în…î.
Someone asks for a language to be added.
M…îg…î d…î b‚Äôa …≤ini ka kan d…î fara a kan.
Sorry, Common Voice is running slowly. Thanks for your interest.
Hak…õto Common Voice ka suma. I ni ce I ka danaya k…îs…în
Aw ka kuma, aw ka d…õm…õ don yan!

Speech is often the most natural way we communicate with each other and voice technologies are bringing that convenience to our computers and mobile devices. We want to empower developers to build amazing voice recognition applications like real-time translators and voice-enabled digital assistants. But right now most of the voice data required to build these kinds of apps is expensive and proprietary. We hope the Common Voice dataset will give developers what they need to innovate and make speech technology available in their own language.
To make voice recognition even more universal, we're collecting voice samples in widely spoken languages as well as those with a smaller population of speakers often underserved by commercial speech recognition services. Publishing a diverse dataset of voices will empower developers, entrepreneurs, and entire speech communities to address this gap themselves.

A ka c‚Äôa la, kuma de ye an ni …≤…îg…în c…õ kuma…≤…îg…înya k…õcogo ye min b…õ k…õ cogo la min b…õ k…õ cogo la min b…õ s…îr…î an y…õr…õ la ani kanko f…õ…õr…õw b…õ ka o n…îg…îya lase an ka …îridinat…õriw ni telef…îni selil…õriw ma. An b‚Äôa f…õ ka fanga di baarak…õlaw ma walasa u ka se ka kumakan d…înni baarak…õmin…õn kabakomaw j…î i n‚Äôa f…î bamanankan bamanankan baarak…õlaw minnu b…õ baara k…õ waati y…õr…õ la ani d…õm…õbagaw niz…õrikan na minnu b…õ se ka kumakan di. Nka sisan y…õr…õ, kumakan kunnafonidilan minnu ka kan ka k…õ walasa ka nin porogaramu suguw dilan, olu fanba s…îng…î ka g…õl…õn, wa u ye u y…õr…õ ta ye. An jigi b‚Äôa kan ko Common Voice kunnafonidilan b…õna f…õn di baarak…õlaw ma u mago b…õ min na walasa ka f…õn kuraw don ani ka kumakan f…õ…õr…õb…î k…õ u y…õr…õ ka kan na.
Walasa ka kan d…înni k…õ di…≤…õ b…õ…õ ta ye ka t…õm…õn f…îl…î kan, an b…õ kan misaliw laj…õ kanw na minnu b…õ f…î kos…õb…õ ani minnu ka kumalasela hak…õ ka d…îg…î, tuma caman na, jagok…õlaw ka kuma d…înni baarak…õlaw t…õ baara k…õ kos…õb…õ. Kumakanw kunnafonidilan suguya caman b…îli b…õna fanga di yiriwalik…õlaw, baarak…õlaw, ani kumakan j…õkulu b…õ…õ ma walasa u y…õr…õ ka se ka o danfara in …≤…õnab…î.
Start typing to describe your accent
A damin…õ ka s…õb…õnni k…õ walasa k‚Äôi ka kumakan …≤…õf…î
Thanks for confirming your account, now let's build your profile.
Aw ni ce aw ka jateb…î la, sisan an k'aw ka profil j…î.
Thanks to contributions from over 259k people in over 50 languages, this data is being used to train speech-enabled applications to better respond to the human voice.
M…îg…î 259000 ni k…î ka d…õm…õ sababu la kan 50 ni k…î la, o kunnafoniw b…õ k…õ ka kuma-se-min…õnw dege walasa ka hadamaden kan jaabi ka …≤…õ.

Thank you for your interest in contributing to { $lang }. We work hard to get every language ready for launch and keep the teams updated via email. If you want to contribute, please provide your email below.

I ni ce I ka timinanjiya la { $langBamanankan } sank…îr…îtanni la. Anw b…õ c…õsirila walasa ka kanw b…õ…õ lakod…în ani ka ba‚Äåarak…õ…≤…îg…înw kunnafoni im…õyi f…õ. N'Aw b'a f…õ ka aw ka boÃÅlomafara lase, A y'aw ka imayi s…õb…õn duguma.

The Common Voice dataset complements Mozilla‚Äôs open source voice recognition engine Deep Speech. The first version of Deep Speech was released in November 2017 and has continued to evolve ever since. Together with the Common Voice dataset, we believe this open source voice recognition technology should be available to everybody. It‚Äôs our hope these technologies will enable developers to build a wave of innovative products and services.

Common Voice kunnafonidilan b…õ Mozilla ka da wulilen kan d…înni masin Deep Speech dafa. Deep Speech b…îko f…îl…î b…îra san 2017 nowanburukalo la, wa a b…õ ka wuli ka taa a f…õ kabini o waati. An ni Common Voice kunnafonidilan j…õlen, an dalen b‚Äôa la ko nin kan d…înni f…õ…õr…õ dafalen in ka kan ka s…îr…î b…õ…õ bolo. An jigi b‚Äôa kan ko nin f…õ…õr…õ ninnu b…õna k…õ sababu ye ka baarak…õlaw d…õm…õ u ka se ka f…õn kuraw ni baarak…õmin…õn kuraw j…î.

The Common Voice dataset is an open and publicly available resource that can be used to train a wide variety of speech-enabled applications. To protect the security of our contributors, we ask everyone who downloads the Common Voice dataset to respect contributors‚Äô privacy.
All voice clips in the dataset are scrubbed of personally identifying information. When you download the dataset, you agree to not attempt to determine the identity of any contributor. That means you cannot try to link information in the dataset to a contributor‚Äôs personal information. You may, however, use the dataset to train speech recognition, speaker recognition, or other applications, by, for instance, linking information in the dataset to other information already in the dataset.

Common Voice dataset ye nafolomaf…õn ye min dab…îra ani min b…õ s…îr…î foroba la, min b…õ se ka k…õ ka kuma-se-min…õn suguya caman dege. Walasa k‚Äôan ka bolomafaraw lakana, an b‚Äôa …≤ini m…îg…î o m…îg…î f…õ minnu b…õ Common Voice kunnafonidilan telesarse, u ka d…õm…õbagaw ka danbe bonya.

The Common Voice dataset is available for download under the <licenseLink>CC0</licenseLink> license on <datasetLink>our Datasets page</datasetLink>. You can also download several other publicly available datasets from the same page.

Common Voice kunnafonidilan b…õ se ka telesarse <licenseLink>CC0</licenseLink> lase k…în…î <datasetLink>an ka Datasets …≤…õ</datasetLink> kan. Aw b…õ se fana ka kunnafonidilan damad…î w…õr…õw telesarse minnu b…õ s…îr…î foroba la ka b…î …≤…õ kelen na.
The Common Voice Sentence Collector has collected { $sentenceCount } sentences in { $languageCount } languages!
Common Voice Sentence Collector ye { $sentenceCount } kumasenw laj…õ { $languageCount } kanw na!

The goal of the Common Voice dataset is to enable anyone in the world to build speech recognition, speaker recognition, or any other type of application that requires voice data. A voice assistant is just one of many types of applications you could use the dataset to build.

Common Voice dataset la…≤ini ye ka di…≤…õ k…în…î m…îg…î o m…îg…î d…õm…õ a ka se ka kuma d…înni, kumalasela d…înni, walima baarak…õmin…õn suguya w…õr…õ j…î min b…õ kan kunnafoniw wajibiya. Kumakan d…õm…õnan ye baarak…õmin…õn suguya caman d…î d…îr…în de ye i b…õ se ka baara k…õ ni kunnafonidilan ye walasa k‚Äôu j…î.

The multi-language version of the Common Voice dataset is currently undergoing community supported bundling and cleaning. If you would like to help us bring Common Voice to new languages, go check out the <sentenceCollectorLink>Sentence Collection Tool</sentenceCollectorLink> for adding new sentences to the dataset, and Mozilla <pontoonLink>Pontoon</pontoonLink> for translating the website itself. New languages are added to Common Voice for voice contribution when 5000 approved sentences have been collected.

Common Voice kunnafonidilan min b…õ kan caman na, o b…õ ka sigida d…õm…õni ni a saniyalen k…õ sisan. N‚Äôi ‚Äã‚Äãb‚Äôa f…õ k‚Äôan d…õm…õ ka Common Voice lase kan kuraw la, taa <sentenceCollectorLink>Kunnafoni dalaj…õmin…õn</sentenceCollectorLink> laj…õ walasa ka kumasen kura fara kunnafonidilan kan, ani Mozilla <pontoonLink>Pontoon</pontoonLink> walasa ka siti in baara a y…õr…õ ye. Kan kura b…õ F√Ýra Common Voice kan kanko d…õm…õni kama ni kumasen 5000 dab…îra minnu Dab…îra.
The number of recordings and which languages you contribute to will be public.
F…îlisenw hak…õ ani i b…õ d…õm…õ don kan minnu na, o b…õna k…õ foroba ye.

These languages are currently under community development. <localizationGlossaryLink>Website localization</localizationGlossaryLink> and <sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink>sentence collection</sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink> is needed to launch.

O kan ninnu b…õ sigida yiriwali la sisan. <localizationGlossaryLink>Website sigidako</localizationGlossaryLink> ani <sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink>kumasenw dalaj…õ</sentenceCollectionGlossaryLink> ka kan ka damin…õ.
The website text is translated into that language.
Site web s…õb…õnniw bamanankanna o kan na.
This is approximately the number of hours required to train a production speech-to-text system.
O b…õ b…õn l…õr…õ hak…õ ma min ka kan ka k…õ walasa ka baarak…õcogo d…î dege min b…õ k…õ ni kuma ni s…õb…õnni ye.*
This is our process for translating and adapting our content for many locales (languages).
Nin ye an ka taabolo ye walasa k‚Äôan ka bay…õl…õmali baara ani k‚Äôu b…õr…õb…õn sigida (kan caman) caman ma.

To make the Common Voice dataset as useful as possible we have decided to only allow source text that is available under a Creative Commons (CC0) license. Using the CC0 standard means its more difficult to find and collect source text, but allows anyone to use the resulting voice data without usage restrictions or authorization from Mozilla. Ultimately, we want to make the multi-language dataset as useful as possible to everyone, including researchers, universities, startups, governments, social purpose organizations, and hobbyists.

Walasa ka Common Voice kunnafonidilan nafa s…îr…î cogo min na an y‚Äôa latig…õ ka s…în s…õb…õnw b…îy…îr…î d…îr…în ma minnu b…õ s…îr…î Creative Commons (CC0) ka lase k…în…î. Baara k…õli ni CC0 sariya ye, o k…îr…î ye ko a ka g…õl…õn ka s…îr…î ka s…îr…îy…îr…î s…õb…õnniw s…îr…î ani k‚Äôu laj…õ, nka a b…õ sira Di m…îg…î o m…îg…î ma ka baara K…õ ni kan kunnafoniw s…îr…îlenw ye k‚Äôa s…îr…î baarak…õcogo dantig…õli ma K…õ walima ni yamaruya ma B…î Mozilla f…õ. A laban na, an b‚Äôa f…õ ka kan caman kunnafonidilan in k…õ nafama ye b…õ…õ bolo, i n‚Äôa f…î …≤ininik…õlaw, iniw…õrisitew, damin…õbagaw, g…îf…õr…õnamanw, sigidako t…înw, ani …≤…õnaj…õlam…îg…îw.

Translation is from English, but you can see Suggestions in other languages. Click the Profile icon, then Settings link and add any languages you speak. At the bottom right-hand corner will be a list of translations called Locales. Translations show on the site after one day.

Bay…õl…õmali b…õ k…õ ka b…î Angil…õkan na, nka i b…õ se ka Ladilikan ye kan w…õr…õw la. Profile taamasiy…õn digi, o k…î Settings y…îr…î digi ani i b…õ kan minnu f…î, i b…õ olu fara a kan. Jiginni kininbolo f…õ, bamanankan baarak…õcogo d…îw b…õna s…îr…î minnu b…õ wele ko Y…îr…îw. Bamanankan bay…õl…õmaniw b…õ jira site web kan tile kelen k…îf…õ.
Upload of this clip keeps failing at server. Reload the page or try again later.
Nin klip in bilali b…õ taa a f…õ ka d…õs…õ s√®rw…õri kan. I ka …≤…õ in doni kokura walima k‚Äôa laj…õ kokura k…îf…õ.
Upload of this clip keeps failing, keep retrying?
Nin klip in bilali ma …≤…õ, i ka to k‚Äôa …≤ini wa?
Baara k…õ ni Common Voice ye
Validating donated clips is equally important to the Common Voice mission. Take a listen and help us create quality open source voice data.
Klip minnu dira, olu ti…≤…õni nafa ka bon o cogo kelen na Common Voice cidenyabaara la. Aw ye lam…õnni k…õ ani k‚Äôan d…õm…õ ka kumakan kunnafoni dafalenw dilan minnu ka …≤i.
View your progress against personal and project goals.
Aw ye aw ka …≤…õtaa laj…õ ka k…õ…≤…õ ni aw y…õr…õ ka la…≤iniw ni poroze kuntilenna ye.

Voice is natural, voice is human. That‚Äôs why we‚Äôre excited about creating usable voice technology for our machines. But to create voice systems, developers need an extremely large amount of voice data.

Kan ye dacogo ye, kan ye hadamaden ye. O de y‚Äôa to an nis…îndiyalen don ka kumakan f…õ…õr…õb…îlanw dilan minnu b…õ se ka baara k…õ¬∂ an ka masinw kama. Nka walasa ka kumakanw dab…î, baarak…õlaw mago b…õ kan hak…õ camanba la kos…õb…õ¬∂ kunnafoniw.

Voice is natural, voice is human. That‚Äôs why we‚Äôre fascinated with creating usable voice technology for our machines. But to create voice systems, an extremely large amount of voice data is required.

Kan ye dacogo ye, kan ye hadamaden ye. O de y‚Äôa To an b…õ …≤…õnaj…õ ni kan ye min b…õ Se ka baara K…õ¬∂ f…õ…õr…õ kuraw ka …≤…õsin an ka masinw ma. Nka walasa ka kumakanw dab…î, kan hak…õ min ka bon kos…õb…õ¬∂ . kunnafoniw de wajibiyalen don.

Voice recognition technology is revolutionizing the way we interact with machines, but the currently available systems are expensive and proprietary. Common Voice is part of Mozilla‚Äôs initiative to make voice recognition technologies better and more accessible for everyone. Common Voice is a massive global database of donated voices that lets anyone quickly and easily train voice-enabled apps in potentially every language.

Kan d…înni f…õ…õr…õ b…õ ka f…õn caman s…õm…õntiya an ni masinw ka j…õ…≤…îg…înya k…õcogo la, nka sisan, sigida minnu b…õ yen, olu s…îng…î ka g…õl…õn, wa u ye an y…õr…õ ta ye. Common Voice ye Mozilla ka baara d…î ye walasa ka kumakan d…înni f…õ…õr…õw k…õ ka …≤…õ ani ka se ka s…îr…î b…õ…õ f…õ. Common Voice ye di…≤…õ k…în…î kunnafonis…õb…õnba ye min b…õ kumakanw dilab…î, min b‚Äôa to m…îg…î b…õ…õ b…õ se ka kumakan-porogaramuw dege teliya la ani n…îg…îya la kan b…õ…õ la min b…õ se ka k…õ.

Voice recognition technology is revolutionizing the way we interact with machines, but the currently available systems are expensive and proprietary. Mozilla Common Voice is an initiative to make voice recognition technologies better and more accessible for everyone. Common Voice is a massive global database of donated voices that lets anyone quickly and easily train voice-enabled apps in potentially every language.
We're not only collecting voice samples ‚Ääin widely spoken languages but also in those with a smaller population of speakers. Publishing a diverse dataset of voices will empower developers, entrepreneurs, and communities to address this gap themselves.

Kan d…înni f…õ…õr…õw b…õ ka ta…≤…õ s…õm…õntiya masinw ka j…õ…≤…îg…înya k…õcogo la, nka sisan, sisit…õmu goÃÅdongoÃÅdonlen minnu b…õ yen, olu s…îng…î ka g…õl…õn, wa ma k…õr…õnk…õr…õnlenw de ta don . Mozilla Common Voice ye hakilinan ye min b…õ kan d…înni f…õ…õr…õw n…îg…îya ani ka las…îr…îli day…õl…õ ma kelenkelen b…õ…õ fe. Common Voice ye di…≤…õ k…în…î kunnafonis…õb…õnba ye min b…õ kumakanw lamara, min b‚Äôa to m…îg…î b…õ…õ b…õ se ka kumakan-porogaramuw lab…õn k…õ teliya la ani n…îg…îya la kan b…õ…õ la.
An t…õ kan misaliw d…îr…în laj…õ kanw na minnu b…õ f…î kos…õb…õ, nka an b…õ kanw fana laj…õ minnu ka f…îbagaw hak…õ ka d…îg…î. Kumakanw kunnafonidilan suguya caman b…îli b…õna fanga di yiriwalik…õlaw, baarak…õlaw ani sigidam…îg…îw ma walasa u y…õr…õ ka se ka o danfara in …≤…õnab…î.
We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.
Anw b…õ ka jama kafo kan f…õ…õr…õw d…õm…õli kama ,Mozila la yan.An b'a f…õ kubariya kuraw kalama ani ka d…în I b'ala ka kumakan labaara togoya min na.
We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.
Anw b…õ ka jama kafo kan f…õ…õr…õw d…õm…õli kama ,Mozila la yan.An b'a f…õ kubariya kuraw kalama ani ka d…în I b'ala ka kumakan labaara togoya min na.
We calculate hours by estimating the average length of each recording, and then multiplying that number by the total number of recordings across all languages.
An b…õ l…õr…õw jateb…î ni f…îlisen kelen-kelen b…õ…õ janya c…õmanc…õ jatemin…õ ye, ka s…îr…î k‚Äôo hak…õ caya ni f…îlisenw b…õ…õ laj…õlen hak…õ ye kan b…õ…õ k…în…î.
We failed to fetch available languages. Contributions are currently not possible. Please try again later.
An ma se ka kanw s…îr…î minnu b…õ s…îr…î. Bolomafaraw t…õ se ka k…õ sisan. Aw ye aw jija ka segin ka a laj…õ k…îf…õ.
We launch the Common Voice site in this language.
An b…õ Common Voice siti damin…õ o kan in na.
We promise to handle your information with care. Read more in our <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>.
An b…õ layidu ta I ye k'An b'I kumakan latanga.Nin kalan walasa k'I ka famuya jiidi An ka Gindo Sariyaw la.
We promise to handle your information with care. Read more in our <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>.
An b…õ layidu ta I ye k'An b'I kumakan latanga.Nin kalan walasa k'I ka famuya jiidi An ka Gindo Sariyaw la.
We‚Äôre crowdsourcing an open-source dataset of voices. Donate your voice, validate the accuracy of other people‚Äôs clips, make the dataset better for everyone.
An b‚Äôa ka jamanadenw ka kunnafonidilan dafalen d…î k…õ kanw kan. Aw k‚Äôaw kan di, ka m…îg…î w…õr…õw ka klipuw ti…≤…õni sinsin, ka kunnafonidilan k…õ f…õn …≤uman ye b…õ…õ ye.
We're receiving a lot of traffic and are currently investigating the issues.
An b…õ ka trafic caman s…îr…î, wa an b…õ ka ko…≤…õw s…õg…õs…õg…õ sisan.

We use a Mozilla tool called <pontoonLink>Pontoon</pontoonLink> for translations. Pontoon has lots of languages, but if it doesn‚Äôt have yours you can <pontoonRequestLink>request for your language to be added</pontoonRequestLink>. Then, to make the language available on the Common Voice project, <githubRepoLink>request the new language on GitHub</githubRepoLink>. <localizationFragment>See more on site translation</localizationFragment>.

An b…õ baara K…õ ni Mozilla baarak…õmin…õn d…î ye min b…õ Weele ko <pontoonLink>Pontoon</pontoonLink> bamanankan-falen-falen kama. Pontoon b…õ kan caman f…î, nka n'i ta t'a la i b…õ se ka <pontoonRequestLink>…≤ini i ka kan ka fara a kan</pontoonRequestLink>. O k…îf…õ, walasa kan in ka se ka s…îr…î Common Voice poroz…õ kan, <githubRepoLink>kan kura …≤ini GitHub</githubRepoLink> kan. <localizationFragment>Aw ye kunnafoni w…õr…õw laj…õ site bamanankan</localizationFragment> kan.

We want the Common Voice dataset to reflect the audio quality a speech-to-text engine will hear in the wild, so we‚Äôre looking for variety. In addition to a diverse community of speakers, a dataset with varying audio quality will teach the speech-to-text engine to handle various real-world situations, from background talking to car noise. As long as your voice clip is intelligible, it should be good enough for the dataset.

An b‚Äôa f…õ Common Voice kunnafonidilan ka mankan cogoya jira, kuma ni s…õb…õnni masin b…õna min m…õn kungo k…în…î, o de kama an b…õ suguya caman …≤ini. Ka fara kumalasela suguya caman kan, kunnafonidilan min ka mankan cogoya t…õ kelen ye, o b…õna kuma ni s…õb…õnni mot…õri kalan walasa ka di…≤…õ ko lakikaw suguya caman …≤…õnab…î, k‚Äôa ta k…îkan kuma na ka se mobili mankan ma. Ni i ka kumakan-klip b…õ faamuya, a ka kan ka k…õ ko…≤uman ye dataset (da…≤…õgafe) la.
We will be in touch with more information as it becomes available.
An b…õna kunnafoni w…õr…õw di n‚Äôu s…îr…îla.
We will not make your email public.
An t…õna i ka bataki ci foroba la.
What does it mean that I can‚Äôt ‚Äúdetermine the identity‚Äù of speakers in the Common Voice dataset?
O k…îr…î ye mun ye ko n t…õ se ka kumalasela minnu b…õ Common Voice kunnafonidilan k…în…î, olu ‚Äúdantig…õli‚Äù?
What level of audio quality is required for a voice clip to be used in the dataset?
Odio jogo hak…õ jum…õn de ka kan ka k…õ walasa kumakan-klip d…î ka se ka k…õ kunnafonidilan k…în…î?
What‚Äôs the difference between Common Voice and Deep Speech?
Danfara jum…õn b…õ Common Voice ni Deep Speech c…õ?
When a user rejects a voice clip it returns to the Queue. If rejected a second time, the voice clip is moved to the Clip Graveyard.
Ni baarak…õla d…î banna kumakan-klip d…î la a b…õ segin Layidu la. Ni a banna si…≤…õ filanan na, kumakan-klip b…õ taa Clip kaburudo la.
When will you release Common Voice data in other languages?
Tuma jum…õn na i b…õna Common Voice kunnafoniw b…î kan w…õr…õw la?
Where does the source text come from?
Which variant of { $language } do you speak?
Mun na o nafa ka bon?
Why don‚Äôt you ask people to read from books or Wikipedia articles in different languages?
Mun na i t‚Äôa …≤ini m…îg…îw f…õ u ka kalan k…õ gafew k…în…î walima Wikipeja barokunw na kan w…õr…õw la?
Why is 10,000 validated hours the per language goal for capturing audio?
Mun na l…õr…õ 10 000 min s…õg…õs…õg…õra, o ye kan kelen-kelen b…õ…õ kuntilenna ye walasa ka odio min…õ?
Why is Common Voice part of the Mozilla mission?
Mun na Common Voice ye Mozilla cidenyabaara d…î ye?
Why is my language not included yet?
Mun na ne ka kan ma don a la f…îl…î?
Why should I sign up for an account?
Mun na ne ka kan ka n t…îg…î s…õb…õn jateb…îs…õb…õn d…î la?
Yes, send me emails. I‚Äôd like to stay informed about the Common Voice Project.
Aw…î, Im…õyiw ci N'ma.N b'a f…õ ka k…õ Common Voice Project kunnafoniw kalama
Yes, send me emails. I'd like to stay informed about the progress of this language on Common Voice.
∆Üw…î, i ka email ci n ma. N b'a f…õ ka to ka kunnafoni s…îr…î kan in ka …≤…õtaa kan Common Voice k…în…î.

Yes, we especially want your voice! Part of the aim of Common Voice is to gather as many different accents as possible so that voice recognition services work equally well for everyone. This means donations from non-native speakers are particularly important.

∆Üw…î, an b‚Äôa f…õ k…õr…õnk…õr…õnnenya la i ka kan ka k…õ! Common Voice la…≤ini d…î ye ka f…îcogo suguya caman laj…õ walasa kan d…înni baarak…õlaw ka baara k…õ cogo kelen na b…õ…õ ye. O k…îr…î ye ko bolomafara minnu b…õ b…î m…îg…î minnu f…õ, olu nafa ka bon k…õr…õnk…õr…õnnenya la.
You can choose to make your username public or anonymous.
I b…õ se k‚Äôa sugandi k‚Äôi ka baarak…õla t…îg…î k…õ foroba la walima k‚Äôa t…îg…î f…î.
You have not added any languages yet.
Aw ma kan si F√Ýra o kan f…îl…î.
You have not selected any languages. Please go to your <profileLink>Profile</profileLink> to select languages.
I ma kan si sugandi. Aw ye taa aw ka <profileLink>Profile</profileLink> la walasa ka kanw sugandi.

Your accent is the way you pronounce words. It can be shaped by where you have lived, which other languages you speak and lots of other factors. You can share any information you feel is relevant here.

I ka f…îcogo ye i b…õ da…≤…õw f…îcogo minna. O b…õ s…îr…î I sigiy…îr…î f…õ , i b…õ kan w…õr…õ minnu f…î ani f…õn caman w…õr…õw. Aw b…õ se ka kunnafoni b…õ…õ lase yan aw hakili la min b…õ se ka mago …≤…õ.
Your username and email will not be associated with the published data.
I ka baarak…õla t…îg…î ni i ka imeyili t…õna j…õ ni kunnafoniw b…îlenw ye.
You've successfully signed up for contributing to { $language }. Thank you.
I t…îg…î s…õb…õnna ka …≤…õ { $language } bolomafara di la. I ni ce.
